event_or_artifact: Google researchers publish the Transformer architecture.
allowed_use: Use as ancestry and substrate context for Google's later model position.
caveat: Do not imply Google alone caused all later LLM progress or that Transformer architecture solved grounding/truth.

event_or_artifact: PaLM paper presents a 540B dense Transformer language model trained with Pathways.
allowed_use: Use for Google scaling and Pathways infrastructure framing.
caveat: Exact benchmark values and training-system details need row extraction before charts.

event_or_artifact: Google opens Bard as an early generative-AI collaboration experiment and frames it as complementary to Search.
allowed_use: Use for defensive interface and Search-adjacent product posture.
caveat: Do not use as proof of adoption, quality, or market leadership.

event_or_artifact: Google and Google DeepMind introduce Gemini as a multimodal model family with Ultra, Pro, and Nano.
allowed_use: Use for Gemini family framing, multimodal strategy, and Google DeepMind product banner.
caveat: Benchmark superiority and safety claims require separate extraction.

event_or_artifact: Bard becomes Gemini; Google launches Gemini Advanced and a mobile app.
allowed_use: Use for product consolidation and consumer assistant branding.
caveat: Pricing, subscriber counts, preference claims, and productivity outcomes need separate rows.

event_or_artifact: Gemini 1.5 technical report frames long-context multimodal understanding.
caveat: Do not claim long context solves retrieval, code understanding, or enterprise knowledge work.

event_or_artifact: Google brings Gemini 1.5 Pro to Gemini Advanced with a 1M-token product framing; developer update discusses Gemini 1.5 Pro/Flash and 2M-token access paths.
allowed_use: Use for consumer/developer long-context product conversion.
caveat: Exact availability and widest-availability claims need date-specific normalization.

event_or_artifact: Google frames Gemini 2.5 Pro around model updates and thinking.
caveat: Exact benchmark numbers and best-model claims remain blocked.

event_or_artifact: Google DeepMind model-card page is captured as a mutable model-card surface.
allowed_use: Use as a source-discovery and documentation-surface handle.
caveat: Because page may include post-cutoff updates, do not use as exact cutoff model list without row normalization.
